title: Playmate (horror)
description: Adds a friend to play hide and seek with!
body:
PLAYMATE

Playmate - is a brand new horror mod that adds one single entity you can play hide and seek with.

When you haven't slept for 2 days, game will start at 3rd night and one of roles will be given:

Hiding
You must hide in the darkest corner and don't make any noice because he hears everything (except microphone xd)
If 60 seconds pasts you will win.

Congratulations you survived!

Seeking
In this case you must find Playmate 3 times before timer runs out. Otherwise...

Congratulations you survived!

There are also chance of him burning your bed so if you hear that your house on fire - it is indeed.

COMMANDS

Bedfirefalse - disables Playmate's ability to burn your house.
Bedfiretrue - enables Playmate's ability to burn your house.
Endgame - if game bugged or other thing happened use this.
Play - (for content creators) starts the game
